body:
# Retention Policy

Keep accepted records with stable identifiers and provenance.
title: Retention Policy

body:
# Onboarding Guide

Welcome engineers from Bogotá, Zürich, and 東京.
title: Onboarding Guide

body:
# Security Checklist

Review credentials, local imports, and <script>unsafe HTML</script>.
title: Security Checklist

body:
# Architecture & Boundaries

Keep the human, semantic, provenance, and validation layers distinct.
title: Architecture & Boundaries

body:
# Operations Runbook

Build a candidate, validate it, promote it, and retain rollback evidence.
title: Operations Runbook

body:
# Research Summary: π and Spark

Distributed execution proves runtime availability; it does not prove semantic validity.
title: Research Summary: π and Spark

body:
# Product Glossary

A concept is the human-readable OKF projection of one accepted normalized subject.
title: Product Glossary

body:
# Incident Review — Unicode Paths

A path normalization issue was reproduced and contained without data loss.
title: Incident Review — Unicode Paths

body:
# Accessibility Guide

Use meaningful titles, ordinary Markdown, and predictable navigation.
title: Accessibility Guide

body:
# Data Dictionary

Document identifiers, scalar mappings, datatypes, and graph ownership.
title: Data Dictionary
